# javascript

<!-- archie:ai-start -->

> Published npm package (@openmeter/sdk) for the OpenMeter JavaScript SDK. Orchestrates code generation (openapi-typescript + orval), dual ESM/CJS build (duel), and exports four sub-packages: default (admin client), /portal, /react, /zod. All source files under src/ are either generated or hand-authored wrappers; the dist/ is the published artifact.

## Patterns

**Generated-first src/client/schemas.ts** — schemas.ts is regenerated by scripts/generate.ts using openapi-typescript on api/openapi.cloud.yaml. Never hand-edit it; changes are lost on next `pnpm run generate:client`. (`pnpm run generate:client  # runs tsx scripts/generate.ts && biome format`)
**Orval for Zod schemas** — src/zod/index.ts is produced by orval using orval.config.ts (input: ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, output: zod client, PascalCase naming). Never edit this file; run `pnpm run generate:zod`. (`orval && tsx scripts/add-as-const.ts && biome lint --write ./src/zod/index.ts`)
**Four named sub-package exports** — package.json exports map '.', './portal', './react', './zod' to separate dist entry points. New resource classes go in src/client/ and must be registered as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts. (`exports: { '.': './dist/index.js', './portal': './dist/src/portal/index.js', './react': './dist/src/react/context.js', './zod': './dist/src/zod/index.js' }`)
**Dual ESM/CJS build via duel** — Build script is `duel`, producing both dist/*.js (ESM) and dist/cjs/*.cjs (CJS). tsconfig.json compilerOptions use module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=nodenext. (`"build": "duel"`)
**openapi-typescript patch applied at install time** — pnpm.patchedDependencies in package.json applies patches/openapi-typescript.patch to the dist/ of the installed openapi-typescript package. After upgrading openapi-typescript, regenerate or update the patch file. (`pnpm.patchedDependencies: { 'openapi-typescript': 'patches/openapi-typescript.patch' }`)
**Biome for linting and formatting** — biome.json configures Biome as the sole linter/formatter (no eslint/prettier except prettier used by orval). Style rules include useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse. Run `pnpm run format` or `biome lint --write`. (`"lint": "tsc --noEmit && biome lint ."`)

## Key Files

| File | Role | Watch For |
|------|------|-----------|
| `orval.config.ts` | Drives orval code generation for src/zod/index.ts. Input is ../../openapi.cloud.yaml. PascalCase naming. Coercion enabled for body/param/query. | Changing the input path breaks generation if the relative URL from scripts/ does not resolve; orval must be run from the package root. |
| `package.json` | Defines the four sub-package exports, pnpm patch for openapi-typescript, generate/build/test scripts, and peer dependency on react >=18. | Adding a new export path requires updating both 'exports' and ensuring the duel build emits the matching file; missing either breaks consumers. |
| `tsconfig.json` | Strict TypeScript config. Excludes test files and scripts/ from compilation. Includes react/*.tsx for JSX. | scripts/**/*.ts and *.config.ts are excluded — type errors in build scripts are silent unless run separately with tsc. |
| `patches/openapi-typescript.patch` | Single consolidated patch applied to openapi-typescript dist/ via pnpm patchedDependencies. Contains all local bug fixes not yet upstream. | Stale patch base hash after upgrading openapi-typescript causes pnpm install to fail. Must regenerate patch after each upgrade. |
| `index.ts` | Root package entry — re-exports everything from src/client/index.js. Do not add logic here. | Only re-exports the default (admin) client. Portal, react, and zod are separate sub-package exports, not re-exported from the root. |

## Anti-Patterns

- Hand-editing src/client/schemas.ts or src/zod/index.ts — both are generated and overwritten by `pnpm run generate`
- Adding admin-level endpoints to src/portal/ — the portal client is intentionally restricted to portal-token-scoped operations
- Adding new resource classes to src/client/ without registering them as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts
- Running scripts/generate.ts from a directory other than the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml will fail to resolve
- Creating multiple patch files instead of the single consolidated patches/openapi-typescript.patch — pnpm patchedDependencies expects one file

## Decisions

- **openapi-typescript is patched at the dist/ level rather than forked** — Allows tracking upstream releases while carrying local fixes; the patch is reapplied automatically by pnpm at install time and must be regenerated after each upstream upgrade.
- **Four distinct sub-package exports instead of a single entry** — Admin client, portal client, React integration, and Zod schemas have different runtime dependencies and bundle sizes; splitting them lets consumers tree-shake and avoid pulling in react or zod unless needed.
- **Type overrides (date-time → Date) applied via openapiTS transform hook in scripts/generate.ts, not post-hoc regex** — The transform hook runs during AST traversal so the override is type-safe and stable across openapi-typescript upgrades; regex post-processing is fragile and order-dependent.

## Example: Generate the full SDK (schemas + zod) after the OpenAPI spec changes

```
# From api/client/javascript/
pnpm --frozen-lockfile install
pnpm run generate        # runs generate:client + generate:zod
pnpm run build           # duel ESM+CJS build
pnpm run lint            # tsc --noEmit && biome lint
pnpm run test            # vitest --run
```

<!-- archie:ai-end -->
